title: Richard Abramowicz
compiled_truth: Richard Abramowicz is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-06-11 to 2001-08-13), Richard Abramowicz sent 10 and received 27 emails, totalling 37 interactions.
